Issues.title: Moradabad's Core Issues
Issues.subtitle: What we stand for and why it matters. The blueprint for progress.
Issues.employment_desc: Moradabad's brass industry workers and youth deserve stable livelihoods, not just empty promises. We fight for job creation and fair wages.
Issues.education_desc: Every child has the right to quality education. We demand better infrastructure, qualified teachers, and modernized government schools.
Issues.healthcare_desc: Our district hospitals need urgent upgrades. Accessible, affordable, and high-quality healthcare is a fundamental right for every family.
Issues.farmers_desc: Standing with the backbone of our economy. Local farmers need fair price guarantees (MSP), support against crop damage, and respect.
Issues.womens_safety_desc: Ensuring dignity and security for every woman. We need safer public spaces, better law enforcement response, and zero tolerance for harassment.
Issues.infrastructure_desc: Roads, uninterrupted power, and clean water are basic necessities that Moradabad is still waiting for. It's time to build a modern city.

AchievementsPage.title: Congress Achievements
AchievementsPage.subtitle: From Independence to Mangalyaan, India's historic achievements under Congress leadership.
AchievementsPage.a1_desc: India became the first country to reach Mars orbit on its first attempt. This mission was launched by ISRO under the Congress-UPA government.
AchievementsPage.a2_desc: India's first indigenously built aircraft carrier. A symbol of Indian Navy's self-reliance.
AchievementsPage.a3_desc: World Health Organization (WHO) declared India polio-free. A success of the Congress government's Pulse Polio campaign.
AchievementsPage.a4_desc: India's first all-women commercial bank was established by the UPA government.
AchievementsPage.a5_desc: World's largest biometric identity system — digital identity for 1.3 billion citizens.
AchievementsPage.a6_desc: India's longest train (4286 km) — from Dibrugarh to Kanyakumari.
AchievementsPage.a7_desc: World's largest census — digital record of 121 crore people.
AchievementsPage.a8_desc: Fundamental right to free and compulsory education for every child aged 6-14.
AchievementsPage.a10_desc: 100-day employment guarantee for rural India — world's largest employment program.

AlliancePage.title: United for
AlliancePage.subtitle: The Indian National Developmental Inclusive Alliance is a coalition of secular, democratic forces committed to protecting the Constitution and building a prosperous nation.
AlliancePage.coalition_desc: In Moradabad, Bijender Yadav represents the combined strength, unity, and shared vision of the INDIA Alliance. Our goal is to counter divisive politics with a solid agenda of employment, education, and economic revitalization.
AlliancePage.democracy_desc: Safeguarding constitutional values and ensuring equal rights for everyone.
AlliancePage.economy_desc: Fighting against inflation and standing up for farmers and the youth.
AlliancePage.harmony_desc: Promoting the Ganga-Jamuni Tehzeeb of Moradabad.

FactCheckPage.title: What's the Truth?
FactCheckPage.subtitle: Verified fact-checks of misleading claims — with evidence.
FactCheckPage.claim1_exp: Congress won India its independence, built the Constitution, established IITs, IIMs, led the Green Revolution, White Revolution, Nuclear Program, Aadhaar, MNREGA, RTI — all are contributions of Congress governments.
FactCheckPage.claim2_exp: MNREGA is the world's largest employment program which provided employment to over 14 crore rural families. Even the current government continues it.
FactCheckPage.claim3: Moradabad's brass industry is in crisis.
FactCheckPage.claim3_exp: Yes, due to the complex GST structure, rising raw material prices, and lack of export facilities, Moradabad's brass industry is in severe crisis. Bijender Yadav is fighting to revive this industry.
FactCheckPage.claim4_exp: Congress itself created the RTI (Right to Information) law, which is the biggest weapon for government transparency. If Congress were corrupt, it would never have made this law.

IssuesPage.title: Core Issues
IssuesPage.subtitle: The fight for a better Moradabad starts here. Explore our detailed manifesto and action plan for the constituency.
IssuesPage.issue1_desc: Reviving Moradabad's traditional brass industry by providing subsidies, better export facilities, and skill development centers for the youth.
IssuesPage.issue2_desc: Upgrading government schools, establishing new degree colleges, and ensuring affordable, high-quality education for every child in Moradabad.
IssuesPage.issue3_desc: Building well-equipped multispecialty hospitals, ensuring medicine availability, and improving primary health centers across rural Moradabad.
IssuesPage.issue4_desc: Ensuring timely payment for sugarcane farmers, better MSP implementation, and modern agricultural equipment availability.
IssuesPage.issue5_desc: Strict safety measures, women-focused skill training programs, and financial independence initiatives for the women of Moradabad.
IssuesPage.issue6_desc: Solving the traffic congestion, ensuring 24/7 clean water supply, and building sustainable drainage systems.
IssuesPage.report_title: Have an issue in your locality?
IssuesPage.report_desc: We are listening. Our team is dedicated to documenting every problem faced by the residents of Moradabad. Share your concerns directly with Bijender Yadav.

JoinPage.title: Join the Movement
JoinPage.subtitle: Be a part of the change. Moradabad's future depends on citizens who are willing to step up. Together, we can build a strong, inclusive city.
JoinPage.form_subtitle: Fill out this form to join our volunteer network. A coordinator will reach out to you.

MoradabadPage.subtitle: Known globally as the Brass City (Pital Nagri), Moradabad is a city built on the hard work of its artisans, farmers, and traders.
MoradabadPage.heritage_p1: Moradabad's identity is inextricably linked to its brass handicrafts industry, which accounts for over 40% of India's total brass exports. Millions of livelihoods depend on the rhythmic beating of metal in the karkhanas (workshops) scattered across the city.
MoradabadPage.heritage_p2: However, recent economic policies and lack of infrastructure support have pushed this thriving industry to the brink. Bijender Yadav's primary mission is to revitalize this sector, ensuring artisans receive fair wages, better working conditions, and direct access to international markets without middlemen.
MoradabadPage.stat1_label: People dependent on the brass trade
MoradabadPage.demo_p1: Moradabad is a vibrant tapestry of cultures and communities. The strength of this constituency lies in its Ganga-Jamuni tehzeeb — a shared cultural heritage that emphasizes unity in diversity.
MoradabadPage.demo_p2: The Indian National Congress, along with the INDIA Alliance, stands firmly on the principle that the progress of Moradabad requires taking every community along. Divisive politics have only stalled development, and Bijender Yadav is fighting to restore the focus on real issues: education, health, and jobs.
MoradabadPage.quote: Moradabad isn't just a constituency to me; it is my home, my family, and my responsibility. When the furnaces of the brass city burn bright, the whole nation shines.

ManifestoPage.subtitle: Official manifesto of the Indian National Congress. Promise to the people, for the people.
ManifestoPage.p1_desc: Commitment to increase rural employment guarantee to 150 days.
ManifestoPage.p2_desc: Free quality education for all children aged 6-18.
ManifestoPage.p3_desc: Legal guarantee of MSP and improvement in crop insurance.
ManifestoPage.p4_desc: Promise to make the Right to Information more effective.
